text:
All alone in the rainforest.

Howling wind whipped leaves about my ears. Shadows crept. Something was watching. I froze.

A flash. A giant.

A wolf? Never!

But a wolf? What kind?


My heart hammered. A pack, perhaps?

Maybe only one big enough to carry this stupid backpack.

Maybe only me.

The howl crescendo. They must've heard me.

It doesn't matter.

I sprint.




Faster.

Wouldn't make much difference.

Just keep that heart hammering.

And breath coming!



I'll never know.

Just find my way back.








I saw it!

A light!


I dashed. A pack?!

But fox?!

There!

I saw them eat berries.

They lived.

I could eat berries?

I think berries might just fix my bag?


Just think.

What have I done?


Just breathe.




Maybe I just stole berries?

That'd do.

I'm just lucky.



That light?

Just an owl.

I think owls
